title: thelymitra orientalis
intro: Thelymitra orientalis, also known as the Oriental sun orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is known for its unique and delicate appearance, with a single white or yellowish-green flower that blooms in late summer to early autumn. The Oriental sun orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Thelymitra orientalis typically involve drying the plant material and making teas or infusions to harness its health benefits, which include soothing coughs and relieving congestion.
